auth.signUpDescription: Sign up to join the organization
auth.emailInvitedHint: This email is linked to your invitation.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.signUpSuccessConnected: Account created and signed in successfully!
auth.signUpSuccessCheckEmail: Account created successfully! Please check your emails or sign in.

hero.title: Floowly, your junior {rotating}
hero.subtitle: Create, manage, and execute your business processes with ease. Automate repetitive tasks and boost productivity.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A complete platform to manage all your workflows and business processes

visualWorkflows.title: Visual Workflows
visualWorkflows.description: Create and manage your business processes with an intuitive visual editor. Connect steps, define rules, and automate your workflows.

aiAssisted.title: AI-Assisted Creation
aiAssisted.description: Let AI help you create your workflows. Simply describe your process and our assistant generates the complete structure.

realtimeExecution.title: Real-Time Execution
realtimeExecution.description: Launch and track your workflow execution in real-time. Visualize progress and intervene when necessary.

documentManagement.title: Document Management
documentManagement.description: Centralize all your workflow-related documents. Upload, organize, and share files easily.

apiIntegrations.title: API Integrations
apiIntegrations.description: Connect Floowly to your existing tools via APIs. Automate data exchanges between your systems.

multiTenant.title: Multi-Tenant Management
multiTenant.description: Manage multiple organizations, users, and groups. Control permissions and access to your workflows.

security.title: Advanced Security
security.description: Your data is protected with robust security mechanisms. Compliance and confidentiality guaranteed.

analytics.title: Tracking & Analytics
analytics.description: Analyze your workflow performance. Identify bottlenecks and optimize your processes.

useCases.title: Use Cases by Department
useCases.subtitle: Discover how Floowly can transform your company's processes

workflows.recruitmentDescription: Automate the recruitment process from job posting to candidate onboarding.
workflows.onboardingDescription: Simplify new employee integration with customized workflows.
workflows.leaveRequestDescription: Manage leave requests with automatic hierarchical validation.
workflows.performanceReviewDescription: Organize and track annual performance reviews.
workflows.expenseApprovalDescription: Automate expense report validation and reimbursement.
workflows.invoiceProcessingDescription: Optimize vendor invoice processing and approval.
workflows.budgetApprovalDescription: Manage budget approval requests with multi-level workflows.
workflows.paymentRequestDescription: Automate payment requests and their validation.
workflows.purchaseOrderDescription: Create and track purchase orders with automatic validation.
workflows.accessRequestDescription: Manage access requests to systems and applications.
workflows.incidentManagementDescription: Track and resolve IT incidents in a structured way.
workflows.changeRequestDescription: Manage IT change requests with appropriate validation.
workflows.contractReviewDescription: Organize legal contract review with approval workflow.
workflows.complianceCheckDescription: Ensure regulatory compliance with dedicated workflows.
workflows.maintenanceRequestDescription: Organize maintenance requests with automatic prioritization.
workflows.qualityControlDescription: Automate quality control and validation processes.
workflows.incidentReportDescription: Manage incident reports with investigation workflow.

canvas.title: Intuitive Visual Editor
canvas.subtitle: Create your workflows with ease using our visual editor. Connect steps, define rules, and visualize your processes in real-time.
canvas.connecting: Click on a block to create a connection
canvas.inputHandle: Input point - Click to receive a connection
canvas.outputHandle: Output point - Click to create a connection
canvas.deleteConnection: Do you want to delete this connection?
canvas.deleteNode: Do you want to delete this block?

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In three simple steps, create and launch your workflows

step1.title: Create your workflow
step1.description: Use the visual editor or AI assistant to create your custom workflow.

step2.title: Configure steps
step2.description: Define forms, decisions, and actions for each step of your process.

step3.title: Launch execution
step3.description: Start your workflow and track its execution in real-time with detailed monitoring.

cta.title: Ready to transform your processes?
cta.subtitle: Join Floowly today and discover how to simplify your workflows

demo.title: Request a demo
demo.description: Fill out the form below and we'll contact you quickly to organize a demonstration.
demo.betaNotice: Currently, the solution is in testing phase.
demo.success: Your demo request has been sent successfully! We'll contact you soon.

data.title: Data
data.subtitle: Manage your bases and records (Airtable-like)
data.noTablesDescription: Create your first table to start storing data.
data.deleteTableConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
data.noColumnsDescription: Add a column to define the structure of your table.
data.noRecordsDescription: Add a record to start filling your table.
data.addRecordDescription: Fill the fields below to create a new record.
data.deleteFieldConfirm: Delete field "{{name}}"? Cell values for this column will remain in data but will no longer be displayed.
data.primaryFieldDescription: Used to display when this table is linked (e.g. in link cells instead of "N linked").

globalVariables.title: Global variables
globalVariables.subtitle: Company-wide variables for use in workflows and forms.
globalVariables.editVariableDescription: Update the variable name and type.
globalVariables.noVariablesDescription: Add a variable to store a reusable value.
globalVariables.deleteVariableConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
globalVariables.unlockVariableConfirmDescription: Unlocking "{{name}}" will allow the value to be edited again. Anyone with access can change it. Do you want to continue?

feedback.title: Send us your feedback
feedback.description: Help us improve by sharing your thoughts, suggestions, or reporting issues. We read every message! You can also paste images.
feedback.success: Feedback sent successfully! Thank you for your input.
feedback.error: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.

workflowEditor.title: Edit Workflow
workflowEditor.subtitle: Update your workflow details
workflowEditor.chooseCategory: Choose a category to organize this workflow
workflowEditor.chooseIcon: Choose an icon to visually identify this workflow
workflowEditor.activeDesc: Enable or disable this workflow. Inactive workflows cannot be executed.
workflowEditor.enableApi: Enable API triggers for this workflow
workflowEditor.enableApiDesc: Allow this workflow to be triggered via external API calls
workflowEditor.permissionsDesc: Control who can execute this workflow
workflowEditor.public: Public - Everyone in the company can execute this workflow
workflowEditor.specific: Specific - Only selected users and groups can execute
workflowEditor.dataStructureDesc: Define fields for this workflow's data
workflowEditor.noFieldsDesc: Get started by adding your first field
workflowEditor.updateField: Update a field to your data structure
workflowEditor.addFieldToStructure: Add a field to your data structure
workflowEditor.apiReturnsArray: The API should return a JSON array of strings (e.g., ["Option 1", "Option 2"])
workflowEditor.compactMode: Compact mode (display items in table format)
workflowEditor.workflowStatusesDesc: Define status options for this workflow
workflowEditor.noStatusesDesc: Add your first status to get started
workflowEditor.updateStatus: Update a status option for this workflow
workflowEditor.addStatusOption: Add a status option for this workflow
workflowEditor.chooseColor: Choose a color to represent this status
workflowEditor.deleteStatusConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this status?
workflowEditor.cannotAddFileTypes: Cannot add file, multiple files, signature, or array types as sub-items of an array

workflowExecutions.title: Workflow Executions
workflowExecutions.subtitle: Manage and track your workflow tasks

usersGroups.removeUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the organization?
usersGroups.failedToRemoveUser: Failed to remove user from organization

noOrganization.title: No Organization Found
noOrganization.description: It seems you are not yet part of an organization. You need to be invited to an organization or create one to access Floowly.
noOrganization.cta: Request a Demo to Create One

settings.manageAccount: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
settings.passwordMinLengthHint: Password must be at least 6 characters long
settings.newPasswordMustDiffer: New password must be different from current password
settings.notificationDescription: Choose how you want to be notified about workflow tasks
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive an email when a new workflow step is assigned to you
